channel.title: NZ Tradie Tools
channel.description: Free calculators, templates and guides for New Zealand tradies.

item.title: Tradie Insurance Guide NZ 2026 — What You Need
item.description: Complete NZ tradie insurance guide 2026 — public liability, tool cover, income protection, professional indemnity. What you need, what it costs, who to use.

item.title: Earthquake Strengthening Costs NZ 2026
item.description: Earthquake strengthening costs in NZ 2026 — seismic assessment, retrofit options, and costs per %NBS. What building owners and contractors need to know.

item.title: Bathroom Renovation Cost NZ 2026: Full Price Breakdown
item.description: How much does a bathroom renovation cost in NZ? 2026 price ranges, full item breakdown, consent rules, labour rates, costs by city, and ways to save.

item.title: Roof Replacement Cost NZ 2026: Full Price Guide
item.description: How much does a new roof cost in NZ? 2026 roof replacement costs by house size and material, consent rules, labour factors and how to get quotes.

item.title: Electrician Callout Fee NZ 2026: Rates & Job Costs
item.description: What's the electrician callout fee in NZ? 2026 callout fees, hourly rates, after-hours charges, common job costs and how to keep electrical costs down.

item.title: Kitchen Renovation Cost NZ 2026: Complete Price Guide
item.description: Kitchen renovation cost NZ 2026 — full breakdown of cabinetry, benchtops, appliances and labour, plus consent rules, timelines and ways to save.

item.title: Deck Cost NZ 2026: How Much Does a Deck Cost?
item.description: How much does a deck cost in NZ in 2026? Labour rates per m², materials comparison, consent rules, cost factors and tips for getting deck quotes.

item.title: How to Become a Licensed Electrician NZ
item.description: How to become a licensed electrician in NZ — apprenticeship, EWRB registration, certifying electrician licence, costs, and timeframes. 2026 guide.

item.title: Heat Pump Installation Cost NZ 2026
item.description: Heat pump installation costs in NZ 2026 — supply, labour, and running costs by home size. Includes price ranges for leading brands and NZ regions.

item.title: Building Consent Costs NZ 2026 — Full Guide
item.description: Building consent costs in NZ 2026 — council fees, MBIE levy, BRANZ levy, inspection costs. What to budget before you start any building project.

item.title: Best Accounting Software for NZ Tradies 2026 — Xero vs MYOB vs Hnry
item.description: Compare the best accounting software for NZ tradies in 2026 — Xero, MYOB and Hnry on price, GST handling, invoicing and ease of use for sole traders.

item.title: Trade Qualifications NZ 2026 — What You Actually Need by Trade
item.description: A plain-English guide to NZ trade qualifications in 2026 — NZQA levels, New Zealand Certificates, apprenticeships and licensing requirements by trade.

item.title: Google Business Profile for NZ Tradies 2026 — Get Found Locally
item.description: How NZ tradies can set up and optimise a Google Business Profile to rank in local search and Maps, win more reviews, and get more job enquiries in 2026.

item.title: GST Guide for NZ Tradies 2026 — Registering, Filing & Avoiding IRD Mistakes
item.description: Everything NZ tradies need to know about GST in 2026 — the $60k registration threshold, filing frequency, claiming back GST, and how to avoid costly IRD mistakes.

item.title: How to Get Paid Faster: NZ Tradie Invoice Guide
item.description: Master invoice best practices, payment terms, and automated reminders to improve cash flow and get paid faster in your NZ tradie business.

item.title: NZ Tradie Retention Crisis 2026: Why Tradies Leave for Australia (& What You Can Earn)
item.description: 62,800 NZers left in 2026—63% to Australia. Why? A crane op makes $230k in Sydney. Here's the wage gap, government support programs.

item.title: Consent-Free Granny Flats NZ 2026: Builder and Tradie Guide
item.description: NZ's expanded granny flat exemption rules for 2026 — what tradies and builders need to know about consent-free minor dwellings, limits, and the work pipeline.

item.title: El Niño Winter 2026: NZ Tradies Weather Planning Guide
item.description: NIWA forecast: windy conditions and temperature swings ahead. How to plan jobs, manage safety, and adjust scheduling for June-August 2026.

item.title: Job Costing for NZ Tradies: Markup vs Margin + Labour Budget Secrets
item.description: Learn the difference between markup and margin, calculate true job costs with labour, and price jobs profitably with NZ tradie examples.

item.title: How to Become a Builder in NZ — Qualifications, Apprenticeships, and LBP
item.description: Step-by-step guide to becoming a licensed builder in New Zealand — apprenticeships, BCITO training, LBP registration, timeframes, and what it pays.

item.title: Tradie Business Plan NZ — Simple Template and What to Actually Include
item.description: How to write a tradie business plan in NZ — what to include, what to skip, and how to use a simple plan to actually run your business.

item.title: Red Flags When Getting a Tradie Quote in NZ — What to Watch For
item.description: Know the red flags when getting a tradie quote in NZ. Signs of an unreliable contractor, what poor quotes look like, and how to protect yourself.

item.title: How to Become a Plumber in NZ — Apprenticeships, Certifications, and Pay
item.description: Step-by-step guide to becoming a licensed plumber in New Zealand — plumbing apprenticeships, Plumbers Gasfitters and Drainlayers Board registration.

item.title: How Much Do Tradies Earn in NZ? — 2026 Salary Guide by Trade
item.description: NZ tradie earnings by trade in 2026. Electrician, plumber, builder, carpenter pay rates — employed vs self-employed, apprentice vs qualified.

item.description: Step-by-step guide to becoming a registered electrician in New Zealand — apprenticeships, Electrical Workers Registration Board licensing, and what it pays.

item.description: Plan your IRD provisional tax payments correctly as a NZ tradie. Avoid penalties and manage cash flow with our 2026 guide.

item.description: What a builder's quote should include in NZ — scope, materials, payment schedule, variations, and what's missing from most quotes homeowners accept.

item.description: A 2026 guide to NZ trade apprenticeships — pay rates, qualifications, and what to expect across building, plumbing, electrical and more.

item.description: Essential winter roof inspection and maintenance tips for NZ roofers and builders. Prevent water ingress and storm damage.

item.description: Learn the critical difference between markup and margin for NZ tradies. One wrong calculation could be costing your business thousands every year.

item.description: NZ building consents rose 11% in April 2026, continuing a strong recovery trend. Here's what the data means for tradie pricing, workload, and planning.

item.description: New trades visa pathways coming August 2026. Learn how to sponsor skilled migrant workers and what qualifications and fees are required in NZ.

item.description: The Resource Management Act is being replaced mid-2026. Here's what the new Planning and Natural Environment Bills mean for your business.

item.description: Manage building material inflation in winter 2026 — timber up 3%, gib up 5%, concrete rising. Pricing strategies to protect margins on NZ tradie projects.

item.title: Income Protection Insurance for NZ Tradies — Why ACC Isn't Enough
item.description: ACC only covers accidents. If you're a tradie who gets cancer, has a heart attack, or develops a back condition that isn't work-related, you get nothing.

item.title: How Much Do Electricians Charge in NZ? 2026 Pricing & Callout Rates
item.description: NZ electrician callout fees, hourly rates, and common job costs in 2026 — plus what affects pricing and how to get accurate quotes.

item.title: How Much Do Plumbers Charge in NZ? 2026 Callout Fees & Job Costs
item.description: NZ plumber callout fees, hourly rates and typical job prices in 2026 — what to charge, what to expect before you hire, and how to quote with confidence.

item.title: Should I Register for GST? A NZ Tradie's Guide to the $60,000 Threshold
item.description: If your annual turnover is heading toward $60,000, you need to understand GST registration — what it means, when it's compulsory.

item.title: Do You Need Building Consent in NZ? A Tradie's Practical Guide
item.description: Not every building job needs council consent — but getting it wrong costs serious money. Here's a clear guide to what needs consent, what's exempt.

item.title: The 20% Investment Boost: How NZ Tradies Can Claim It Before EOFY
item.description: The Investment Boost deduction lets NZ tradies write off new asset costs faster. Here's exactly how to claim it on your 2026 return.

item.title: Going Self-Employed as a NZ Tradie — Your Complete Start-Up Checklist
item.description: Everything you need to do when going self-employed as a tradie in New Zealand — IRD registration, GST, ACC, insurance, contracts.

item.title: Understanding the New Proportional Liability Rules for NZ Tradies
item.description: How the proposed shift to proportional liability might change risk management and construction insurance in New Zealand.

item.title: The Fuel Price Shock: How to Protect Your NZ Tradie Business Margins
item.description: Diesel prices have surged in 2026, hitting excavation and transport costs. Learn how to adjust your quotes and protect your margins.

item.title: Understanding the New NZ Granny Flat Rules: A Guide for Builders
item.description: Everything NZ builders need to know about the expanded granny flat building consent exemptions introduced in April 2026.

item.title: What the New NZ-India Trade Agreement Means for Your Construction Business
item.description: How the historic free trade agreement between New Zealand and India might affect material costs and opportunities for NZ tradies.

item.title: NZ Minimum Wage Rises to $23.95 in April 2026: What It Means for Tradie Businesses
item.description: The adult minimum wage increased to $23.95/hr on 1 April 2026. Here's how to update your labour costs, quotes, and pricing before you fall behind.

item.title: Healthy Homes Compliance Work: A Goldmine for NZ Tradies in 2026
item.description: Every NZ rental must now meet Healthy Homes Standards from day one of any tenancy. Here's what work landlords need done.

item.title: Subcontractor or Employee? NZ's New Gateway Test Explained (2026)
item.description: The Gateway Test became law on 21 February 2026 and changes how NZ businesses determine if a worker is a contractor or employee.

item.title: Hiring an Apprentice in NZ: The 2026 Guide for Tradies
item.description: Everything NZ tradies need to know about hiring an apprentice in 2026 — BCITO changes, Apprenticeship Boost funding, costs.

item.title: NZ Building Consent Reform 2026: What Tradies Need to Know
item.description: The biggest building consent reform in decades is underway in NZ. Granny flat exemptions, product approvals, liability changes.

item.title: Opportunities in NZ Water Infrastructure: What Tradies Need to Know
item.description: With over $13 billion in planned water infrastructure investment across NZ, discover how tradies can get involved in this growing sector.

item.title: Mobile Invoicing for NZ Construction Trades
item.description: How NZ construction tradies can invoice on-site with offline mobile apps, PayNow integration and GST-ready templates — get paid faster from any job site.

item.title: Preparing for Winter: A Maintenance Checklist for NZ Tradies
item.description: As the temperature drops in NZ, help your clients prepare their properties with this essential winter maintenance checklist.

item.title: Managing Rising Material Costs: A Guide for NZ Tradies in 2026
item.description: With material costs increasing, here is how you can manage your margins and keep your NZ tradie business profitable in 2026.

item.title: Understanding the New Plumbing Self-Certification Scheme for NZ Tradies
item.description: The new NZ plumbing self-certification scheme explained — what changes for plumbers and drainlayers, how it affects your workflow, and steps to stay compliant.

item.title: How to Choose the Right Insurance for NZ Tradies: A 2026 Guide
item.description: A comprehensive guide to selecting appropriate insurance covers for New Zealand tradespeople in 2026, including public liability, professional indemnity.

item.title: NZ Construction Recovery 2026: What Every Tradie Needs to Know
item.description: Building consents are up 22.9% — but cost pressures are rising too. Here's what the NZ construction industry recovery means for your business.

item.title: Why We're Building Fastcrew: A NZ Tradie App That Doesn't Cost the Earth
item.description: The honest story behind Fastcrew — why we got fed up with expensive, bloated tradie software and decided to build something better for Kiwi tradies.

item.title: Best Job Management Software for NZ Tradies 2026
item.description: Honest comparison of Fergus, Tradify, Simpro, ServiceM8 and more — tested by NZ tradies. Prices, features, and which one suits your trade.

item.title: Tradie App Fatigue: Why NZ Tradies Are Paying Too Much for Too Many Tools
item.description: Most NZ tradies juggle 4–5 software subscriptions. We break down the real monthly cost of app fatigue and how to consolidate your tools to save money.

item.title: Fastcrew vs Tradify vs Fergus: Which NZ Tradie App Is Right for Your Business?
item.description: An honest comparison of Fastcrew, Tradify, and Fergus for NZ tradies — pricing, features, ease of use, and NZ compliance support.

item.title: NZ Tradie Health & Safety Guide 2026 — HSWA Obligations for Small Trade Businesses
item.description: A practical guide to Health & Safety at Work Act 2015 obligations for NZ tradies — PCBU duties, SWMS, incident reporting.

item.title: How to Get Paid Faster as a NZ Tradie — 8 Practical Tips
item.description: Late payments kill tradie cash flow. Here's exactly how to get paid faster in 2026 — invoicing, payment terms, on-site payments, and legal options.

item.title: How to Grow Your Tradie Business in NZ — From One-Man Band to a Proper Team
item.description: How to grow your NZ tradie business — the systems, hires and processes you need, and how to avoid the growth traps that kill small operators.

item.title: Xero vs MYOB for NZ Tradies: Which is Better in 2026?
item.description: An honest comparison of Xero and MYOB for New Zealand self-employed tradies — pricing, features, GST filing, bank feeds.

item.title: How to Get Your LBP Licence in New Zealand (2025 Guide)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to obtaining a Licensed Building Practitioner (LBP) licence in New Zealand — eligibility, application, skills maintenance, and costs.

item.title: Vehicle Expenses for NZ Tradies: IRD Rules Explained (2025)
item.description: How to claim vehicle expenses as a NZ self-employed tradie — logbook, mileage rates, actual costs, GST on vehicles, and what IRD expects.

item.title: Fergus vs Tradify vs Simpro: Which is Best for NZ Tradies?
item.description: A detailed side-by-side comparison of the three most popular job management apps for New Zealand tradies — with real NZD pricing.

item.title: How to Set Up as a Sole Trader in NZ: The Tradie's Guide
item.description: Everything a New Zealand tradie needs to know to start trading legally as a sole trader — IRD registration, GST, bank accounts, insurance, and tools.
